narrative.title: Gene Therapy
narrative.headline: Gene therapy advances
narrative.summary: Recent studies focus on genetic engineering and gene transfer techniques
narrative.brief: Researchers explore new methods for gene therapy, including ex vivo mRNA-based gene transfer and genetic engineering of bioagents. These advancements aim to improve disease control and cancer immunotherapy
narrative.forecast: Watch for further developments in gene therapy clinical trials

narrative.title: Energy Shift
narrative.headline: Grid modeling improves
narrative.summary: Open-source web UI for power grid modeling is developed
narrative.brief: A new open-source web UI called BambooGrid is introduced for power grid modeling and power flow, and research focuses on improving wind and solar power prediction through feature selection. Distributed schemes for economic dispatch of grid-connected battery energy storage systems are also being explored
narrative.forecast: Watch for advancements in energy storage contracting and grid management technologies

sources.label: Hacker News: Show HN: BambooGrid – Open-source web UI for power grid modeling and power flow
arXiv: A Distributed PI+Reset Scheme for Discrete-Time Economic Dispatch of A Grid-connected BESS Network
arXiv: Improving Wind and Solar Power Prediction with Efficient Wrapper-based Feature Selection: An Empirical Study
arXiv: Contracting for Long-Duration Energy Storage in Incomplete Risk Markets

narrative.title: Biochemistry Trends
narrative.headline: Enzyme libraries enhance synthesis
narrative.summary: Recent studies focus on biocatalytic strategies and enzyme libraries for natural product synthesis
narrative.brief: Researchers are exploring biocatalytic approaches for steroid synthesis and natural product synthesis using enzyme libraries, while also investigating post-transcriptional regulation in gene expression models. Additionally, scientists are developing new methods for microbial inulinase production and optimization
narrative.forecast: Watch for further advancements in biocatalytic strategies and enzyme library development for complex molecule synthesis
